features: Lynx Epic Fresh Bodyspray & Socks Gift Set features Lynx Epic Fresh Bodyspray 150ml
This gift set also includes stylish Lynx Epic Fresh socks to match the iconic scent of the bodyspray
The bodyspray revitalises senses with the vibrant and zesty fragrance of grapefruit & tropical pineapple
